title: boraginella zeylanica
intro: Boraginella zeylanica, also known as the Ceylon borage or Burdock, is a plant species that belongs to the Boraginaceae family. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Boraginella zeylanica include the treatment of various ailments such as skin conditions, fever, and digestive issues, as well as its potential in reducing oxidative stress and inflammation. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as a decoction or infusion, and its roots, leaves, and flowers are used to make teas, tinctures, and powders for medicinal purposes.
